> [!WARNING]
> This is an early Apple Silicon macOS preview and may be unsigned or
> unnotarized. macOS Gatekeeper may block its first launch.

Heydesk runs locally and currently expects a compatible Codex installation,
either from the ChatGPT macOS app or from `codex` on your `PATH`.

Download the DMG, drag Heydesk into Applications, and use this build only with
workspaces you are comfortable testing in. These automatic prereleases are
incremental development snapshots; tagged releases are the curated promotion
path.
